Knowledge Graph"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph structure underlying Semantic Memory, enabling relationship traversal and time-aware queries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Structure"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\ngraph LR\n  A[Alice] -->|prefers_language| B[Go]\n  A -->|works_on| C[Project Alpha]\n  C -->|has_deadline| D[2026-05-01]\n  C -->|depends_on| E[Auth Service]\n  E -->|maintained_by| F[Bob]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Dimensions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every edge has temporal metadata:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],": When the relationship became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]}],": When it ceased being true (NULL = current)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],": How certain we are about this fact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],": Which memory entry this was extracted from"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Patterns"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Direct Neighbors"}],"\n",["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# Who works on Project Alpha?\nmem.query_facts(predicate=\"works_on\", object=\"Project Alpha\")\n# &gt; Alice\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Path Traversal"}],"\n",["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# What services does Project Alpha depend on (2 hops)?\nmem.traverse(subject=\"Project Alpha\", depth=2)\n# &gt; Auth Service &gt; Bob (maintainer)\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11"],["$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b"],"$L1c"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@1d"]},null,false,"$@1d"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1e",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$1f",["$L20"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}

11:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Graph queries are fast for shallow traversals (1–3 hops). Deep traversals (5+ hops) may require optimization. Consider materializing common paths if your use case requires deep graph walks."}]}]]}]]}]}]
